title: Personal Sleep Blueprint Checklist
description: Build your personalized sleep plan by checking off the strategies you commit to implementing. This is your roadmap for better sleep.
instructions: Review each strategy and check the ones you plan to incorporate into your sleep routine. Start with 3-5 items and add more over time. Revisit weekly to track what you're consistently doing.

items.label: Set a consistent wake time (even weekends) — my wake time: ___
Set a consistent bedtime based on my sleep need — my bedtime: ___
Create a 30-60 minute wind-down routine before bed
Get 15-30 minutes of bright light within 1 hour of waking
Dim lights and reduce screen exposure 1-2 hours before bed
Make my bedroom as dark as possible for sleep
Exercise regularly but finish vigorous activity 4+ hours before bed
Stop caffeine by early afternoon (my cutoff: ___)
Avoid alcohol within 3 hours of bedtime
Include sleep-supporting foods (tryptophan, magnesium, complex carbs)
Minimize noise or use white noise / earplugs
Use bed only for sleep and intimacy (no work, scrolling, TV)
Practice a relaxation technique before bed (my technique: ___)
Schedule a 'worry time' earlier in the day (not at bedtime)
If awake 20+ minutes, get up and do something calming until sleepy

disclaimer: This checklist is for educational purposes only. If you have persistent sleep problems, consult a healthcare provider or sleep specialist.
